description: Woosmap provides location intelligence products for web and mobile applications, including store search, localities, geolocation, routing, static maps, indoor maps, and datasets. Its platform is used to build location-aware experiences and manage location data.
summary: Woosmap exposes a documented REST API at https://api.woosmap.com authenticated by a Woosmap API key, and it documents an MCP server product but the public docs scraped did not reveal its connect endpoint or auth mechanics.
